title: Plan and monitor works projects in catchments and waterways
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and monitor works projects in catchments and waterways demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Inspect and assess catchment and waterways sites for inclusion in a works program

pcs.text: Establish the environmental outcomes and priorities of the works program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the environmental outcomes and priorities of the works program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the environmental outcomes and priorities of the works program.

pcs.text: Apply workplace health and safety policies and procedures, environmentally sustainable practices and biosecurity measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace health and safety policies and procedures, environmentally sustainable practices and biosecurity measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace health and safety policies and procedures, environmentally sustainable practices and biosecurity measures.

pcs.text: Conduct a site assessment to confirm the physical characteristics and health of catchment and waterways
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a site assessment to confirm the physical characteristics and health of catchment and waterways?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a site assessment to confirm the physical characteristics and health of catchment and waterways.

pcs.text: Assess the range of operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on proposed projects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the range of operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on proposed projects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the range of operating conditions, hazards and sensitive environments for impact on proposed projects.

pcs.text: Assess heritage and cultural values of sites
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess heritage and cultural values of sites?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess heritage and cultural values of sites.

pcs.text: Consult project stakeholders on the scope and purpose of the works program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult project stakeholders on the scope and purpose of the works program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult project stakeholders on the scope and purpose of the works program.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and source equipment and materials and personnel required for project.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm terms and conditions of project work with project stakeholders.

pcs.text: Complete project documentation and communicate details to stakeholders

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete project documentation and communicate details to stakeholders.
